title: Risk Analyst
description: EY's Risk & Compliance Solutions practice is expanding and seeking a Risk Analyst for our Raleigh office. You'll work on enterprise risk assessments, compliance audits, and governance initiatives with major corporate clients. This role offers exposure to diverse industries and risk management frameworks, with strong mentorship from experienced consultants.
responsibilities: Conduct risk assessments and identify control gaps across client processes and systems
Document business processes and develop risk matrices aligned with industry standards
Perform compliance reviews against regulatory requirements and internal policies
Develop risk mitigation recommendations and implementation roadmaps
Prepare client reports, presentations, and governance documentation

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, Accounting, or related discipline
skills: Knowledge of enterprise risk management frameworks (COSO, ISO 31000)
Proficiency with Excel and data analysis
Ability to synthesize complex information for diverse audiences
Understanding of internal audit and compliance processes
certifications: CIA, CRMA, or similar risk/audit certification preferred

benefits: Competitive health, dental, and vision coverage
Training and mentorship from senior consultants
